one_line_summary: The agent delivered a complete, well-documented, and working double-agent TDD feature that cleanly orchestrates the driver-navigator loop.
strengths: Fully implemented the 6-phase contract, including robust retry logic if the RED phase test accidentally passes.
Excellent documentation updates spanning the README, a new dedicated wiki page, and interactive CLI help.
Seamlessly integrated into the REPL via a new `/tdd` slash command handling both sync and async execution.
weaknesses: Unit tests mock the internal `run_agent` function rather than executing end-to-end against a stub provider.
The core orchestrator logic is written as a single monolithic function rather than being broken into discrete phase methods.
Slightly hacky thread pool workarounds and inline imports were used inside the CLI command handlers.
